message:
fix: mitigate TOCTOU gap in handleZombieRestart cleanup wisp creation (gt-7vs1)

Between findAnyCleanupWisp returning empty and createCleanupWisp completing,
another patrol cycle could see the same zombie (no cleanup wisp yet) and enter
the same code path, creating duplicate wisps and double-restarting the session.

Replace check-then-create with create-then-dedup pattern: create the cleanup
wisp first as an atomic interlock, then query for all cleanup wisps. If
duplicates are detected, use deterministic winner selection (lowest wisp ID)
so exactly one patrol proceeds with the restart while the other cleans up
its duplicate. Add findAllCleanupWisps helper for the dedup query.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
